peekOfCode:
def download_video(c: Client, m: Message):
    file = c.download_media(m, in_memory=True)
    fs.put("video/" + file.name, file.getvalue())
    s3.upload_fileobj(
        Fileobj=file,
        Bucket="storage",
        Key="video/" + file.name,
        ExtraArgs={"ACL": "public-read", "ContentType": "video/mp4"},
    )
    print(f"Uploaded {file.name} to {file.name}")

peekOfCode:
files = fs.list()["names"]
for file in s3.ls("storage/video"):
    name = file.split("/", 1)[1]
    if name in files:
        continue
    with s3.open(file, "rb") as f:
        data = f.read()
    fs.put(name, data, content_type="video/mp4")
    print(f"Uploaded {name} to {name}")
print("Upload completed")
